entity_extraction_template: Composite key columns: '表三' → ':'. Empty cells inherit the last non-empty value from the same column above. Top-level key '表三' → 表三 entity. Second-level key ':' → _ entity.
relation_extraction_template: Create HAS_SUB_ITEM relations between hierarchy levels: (表三) -[HAS_SUB_ITEM]-> (_). Create HAS_VALUE relations from leaf entities to numeric columns: "Unnamed: 3", "Unnamed: 4", "Unnamed: 5", "Unnamed: 6" (and 2 more). Attach remarks columns ['Unnamed: 9', 'Unnamed: 10', '按住戶人數及商品或服務類別劃分的每人每月平均開支'] as metadata properties on the leaf entity.
extraction_constraints: Detect hierarchy by sparse fill: empty cells in key columns inherit the parent value.
Top-level key '表三' defines the root entity (表三).
Second-level key ':' defines child entities (_) linked to their parent via HAS_SUB_ITEM.
Numeric columns become HAS_VALUE relations from the leaf entity.
Remarks/notes columns become metadata properties (not separate entities).
Skip rows that are entirely empty or contain only section headers.
